lines.en_lit: shall be stood alive before the Lord, to make atonement over him, Until when required to stand alive? Until the time of the application of the blood of its counterpart, this is the statement of Rabbi Yehuda. Rabbi Shimon says: until the time of the verbal confession

With regard to what do they disagree? As it was taught “to make atonement” The verse speaks of atonement through blood And similarly it states: “When he has made an end of atoning for the Sanctuary, Just as there to atonement through blood, so too here atonement through blood. This is the statement of Rabbi Yehuda.
Rabbi Shimon says: “To make atonement over it”; the verse speaks of atonement through speech,
Come hear Rabbi Akiva’s students asked him: was drawn by left what is he may transfer to right He said to them: Do not give the heretics an opportunity to dominate.
The reason so as not to give heretics an opportunity to dominate, not for this transfer Didn’t you say the drawing is indispensable? And, once left how could we transfer
Rava said: This is are saying: the lot was drawn by left what is he may transfer it, and its goat to right He said to them: Do not give the heretics an opportunity to dominate.
Come hear If had stated “The goat upon which I would have said he place upon it. the verse states: it came up” once has come up it is not necessary more,
To what If we say as a mitzva, by inference, the placement not even a mitzva. Rather, is it not indispensable? And conclude from it drawing is indispensable, the placement is not indispensable.

Rava said: this is what is saying: If had stated “The goat upon which I would have said he should place upon until the time of its slaughter. the verse states: it came up,” once has come up it is not necessary more,
Come hear and he shall offer it for a sin-offering” the lottery makes it a sin-offering, the status does not make it a sin-offering.

might Is there not an a fortiori inference Just as in a case in which a lottery does not consecrate the required status does consecrate them, a case in which a lottery does consecrate is it not right that the required status should consecrate them?
